body: This is a peel off from https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/pull/1108 It adds the TRMM 0-moment test case without doing any of the refactoring.
title: Add trmm 0-moment case to CI

body:
This PR:

 - Moves the precipitation tendencies to the dycore and
 - Adds a 0-moment precip model job, to exercise this code
title: Move precipitation tendencies to dycore

body: This PR fixes CI by removing a trivial mse entry (grid-mean `w` is zero). cc @trontrytel (fyi)
title: Remove trivial mse entry

body: This PR replaces the thermo calls to special case the dry/equil cases.
title: Union split thermo calls over moisture model

body: This PR adds and uses some energy helpers for the initial conditions
title: Refactor energy ICs

body: This PR fixes dry edmf so that SA is _never_ performed if the moisture model is a dry one.
title: Fix dry edmf

body:
This PR:
 - Wraps the `ODE.solve!` in a try-catch, and rethrows the error later (if caught), after the TC debugging profiles have been plotted. This way, we'll always plot the tc debugging profiles, even if the simulation crashes.
 - Rearranges some other code blocks to ensure we don't fail elsewhere before plotting the debugging profiles (e.g., `paperplots` funcs, `verify_callbacks` etc.).

cc @dennisYatunin
title: Use try-catch around solve to plot crashed tc profiles
